#1
drone photo taken Dec 31, 2024 shows underground workshop Fengning pumped-storage power station Fengning Manchu autonomous county, North China' Hebei province. Fengning power station, pumped-storage power station largest installed capacity kind world, put full operation Tuesday. [Photo/Xinhua]
SHIJIAZHUANG -- Fengning pumped storage hydropower plant, largest kind globally, commenced full operation city Chengde, North China' Hebei province.
Operated State Grid Corporation China, facility boasts total installed capacity 3.6 million kilowatts designed generate 6.61 billion kilowatt hours electricity annually.
company said since initial units began operating 2021, plant generated approximately 8.62 billion kilowatt hours electricity.
leading renewable energy storage technology, pumped storage plays key role advancing country' green energy transition.
Fengning plant expected save 480,800 tonnes standard coal reduce carbon dioxide emissions 1.2 million tonnes annually, marking significant contribution country' energy efficiency environmental sustainability goals, company said.
#2
Chinese companies emerged crucial force driving energy transition League Arab States member countries regions, recent EY report said.
Between 2018 2023, total investment construction contract value reached $52.6 billion, spanning both traditional new energy sectors.
Oil gas constitute approximately 74 percent China' energy-related investments LAS nations, totaling $41 billion. Key investment destinations include Iraq, Saudi Arabia, Qatar United Arab Emirates.
Total value oil gas infrastructure projects Chinese enterprises participated amounted $31 billion.
Noteworthy investments being made new energy sector. Chinese investments LAS solar wind energy surpassed $13 billion 2018 2023, representing 24 percent total investment.
particular interest China' proactive expansion upstream segments renewable energy value chain, encompassing solar photovoltaic components wind power equipment.
Furthermore, China emerged largest source automotive imports LAS countries, exhibiting compound annual growth rate 23 past five, said EY report.
#3
China' investment energy transition expected surpass $1 trillion 2030, focus enhancing energy efficiency accelerating electrification, according think tank.
2024, investment China' energy sector forecast reach $850 billion, accounting nearly 30 percent global total, standing 1.5 2 times level United States European Union, according China Energy Outlook 2060 report released Sinopec Economics Development Research Institute, think tank part China Petroleum Chemical Corp.
report highlights shift China' energy investment structure compared 2019, spending fossil fuels declining investments renewable energy generation efficiency improvements surging 70 percent.
However, investment critical areas like grids energy storage lagged, increasing less 10 percent same period. stark contrast European Union, where grid storage investments slightly outpaced renewable energy spending, said.
China doubled share renewable energy energy investment mix - spending 40 percent energy transition funds renewables, roughly twice amount allocated fossil fuels - grid storage development remains weak link, said Luo Daqing, vice-president institute.
cautioned failing align grid investment rapid growth renewable energy could undermine broader energy transition.
Zhou Libo, deputy secretary-general China Electricity Council' electric transportation energy storage branch, said investment set grow integrated energy stations, photovoltaic-storage-charging hubs supercharging stations, alongside upgrades outdated infrastructure adoption advanced technologies automated vehicle--grid interactive charging.
China remains world' largest energy transition investor, contributing $676 billion 2023, 38 percent global total, significantly contributing global green transition, according National Energy Administration.
BloombergNEF' Energy Transition Investment Trends 2024 report echoes view, identifying China global leader green energy shift.
report notes China' grid investments 2023 ranked third among energy transition sectors, totaling $310 billion. Grid development critical bottleneck China' energy transition, said.
2023, global energy transition investments hit record $1.77 trillion, 17 percent --, despite challenges geopolitical conflicts, high inflation rising interest rates. Key sectors driving transition - including renewable energy, storage, nuclear energy, hydrogen, electrification, grids - showed remarkable resilience face external pressures, said.
China' leadership energy transition spending particularly evident electrified transportation, renewable energy grid development. Electrified transport largest single sector, spending rising 36 percent -- $634 billion, said.
Domestic grid companies already stepping investment construction ultra-high voltage power transmission projects, strengthening connection between county-level grids main grid upgrading grid digitalization intelligence.
State Grid Corp China said earlier annual grid investment surpassed 600 billion yuan ($84 billion) time 2024.
Ultra-high voltage transmission lines refer power transmission cables operating greater 800 kilovolts direct current, 1,000 kV alternating current. Compared traditional transmission lines, ultra-high voltage lines only increase transmission capacity extend transmission distances, reduce transmission losses.

China set enhance energy self-sufficiency expanding renewable energy dominance coming, said National Energy Administration conference Beijing Sunday.
crude oil production China increased six consecutive, natural gas output risen eight straight, boosting country' energy self-sufficiency rate above 80 percent 2024, NEA said.
country' total power generation capacity stands around 3.32 billion kilowatts, electricity output reaching 10 trillion kilowatt-hours, 5.7 percent --, said.
Renewable energy resources course contribute country' total energy supply. China set add 300 gigawatts renewable energy capacity, accounting 85 percent newly installed capacity, significant step country' green low-carbon energy transition, said.
China continued accelerate construction large-scale wind solar power bases Gobi Desert arid regions amid efforts boost renewable power, said Wang Hongzhi, head NEA.
date, China had installed 510 million kW wind power 840 million kW photovoltaic power, utilization rate remaining above 95 percent, driving rapid growth both sectors, Wang said.
China transformed upgraded 180 million kW coal power units eliminated 8 million kW outdated capacity, proportion intelligent production capacity total coal production capacity increasing 50 percent, NEA said.
major hydropower projects progressed orderly manner throughout - several large-scale projects approved construction, boosting total hydropower capacity country 435 GW - China become world' largest nuclear power producer, country' total nuclear power generation capacity topping global list.
total 102 nuclear reactors currently operation under construction total installed capacity 113 GW, said.
enhanced national energy security guarantee capacity green low-carbon development, China Electricity Council expects country add around 250 GW new solar power capacity 2024, bringing total installed capacity 850 GW.
would account quarter China' total power generation capacity, said.
According global consultancy Rystad Energy, China' solar sector set break records coming, total installed solar PV capacity expected cross 1,000 GW mark end 2026.
Rystad Energy expects 255 GW new solar PV installation China 2024, another surge installation towards end expected - around 20 GW November 50 GW December.
Renewable energy installation surged since momentum slowing down, said Zhu Yicong, vice-president renewables power research Rystad Energy.
China shown clear leadership global PV installation expecting close 60 percent global installation come China, Zhu said.
Looking ahead, NEA said conference country accelerate planning construction new energy system 2025.

national unified power market system where electricity bought, sold distributed across entire country standardized way. connects regions, ensuring equal access power, promotes competition allows efficient pricing.

Oil gas reinforced supply security throughout China navigates path between energy transition carbon neutrality goals, said industry experts company executives.
world' second-largest economy intensifies efforts align energy security carbon-neutral ambitions, oil gas playing central roles advancements exploration production technology boosted output, ensuring stronger energy resilience, they say.
"China' oil gas industry 2024 demonstrated remarkable resilience adaptability, leveraging advanced technologies increase domestic production reducing reliance imports," said Wu Mouyuan, vice-president Economics Technology Research Institute under China National Petroleum Corp.
Breakthroughs ultra-deep drilling offshore exploration significantly enhanced country' capacity tap abundant challenging reserves, securing robust foundation energy independence, said International Energy Executive Forum 2024 held Beijing earlier month.
Oil gas expected maintain share energy mix medium long term, making critical avoid disruptions caused energy transition. Stable investments forecasts essential maintaining high supply levels ensuring global energy security, said.
According institute, China' energy self-sufficiency rate climbed impressive 85 percent 2024, five-percentage-point increase compared decade ago. figure expected climb 95 percent 2060, driven accelerated innovation exploration scaling renewable energy systems.
energy output surpassed 5 billion metric tons standard coal equivalent, projections 2060 suggest reach 6 billion tons. growth reflects China' strategic dual focus: securing stable fossil fuel supply scaling renewable energy major contributor energy mix, said.
Wu said China' oil gas sectors remain indispensable energy strategy, even nation advances toward goal carbon neutrality before 2060.
Technological breakthroughs, those related ultra-deep oil gas reserve exploration - well deep sea oil gas exploitation - play key role China' energy supply, said.
Chinese ultra-deep oil well broke through 10,000-meter depth mark March 2024, country' well exceeding vertical depth 10,000 meters, setting record only deepest well Asia, world record shortest time taken drill 10,000-meter deep well.
oil drilling industry, wells between 4,500 6,000 meters deep called deep wells. Wells between 6,000 9,000 meters deep called super-deep wells, those deeper 9,000 meters classified ultra-deep wells.
designed depth 11,100 meters, Shendi Take 1 ultra-deep well, located Tarim Basin Northwest China' Xinjiang Uygur autonomous region, part China' efforts expand domestic oil production, said operator CNPC.
shows China independently overcome bottleneck extra-deep well drilling technology, deep-earth oil gas drilling capability supporting technology reached internationally advanced levels, said.
present, China' onshore deep ultra-deep oil gas resources account 34 percent country' total oil gas resources, proportion new deep ultra-deep oil gas reserves increasing.
China world' largest crude oil importer relies imports nearly three-quarters needs. investing billions dollars maintain domestic crude oil production above 4 million barrels day.
Offshore oil gas resources, particular, gaining prominence. China National Offshore Oil Corporation reported record growth both crude oil natural gas output, supported advanced engineering technologies.
nation' offshore oil discovery rate reached 30 percent, exceeding global average 24 percent, offshore natural gas discovery remains area significant untapped potential, said Wang Zhen, head CNOOC Energy Economics Institute, forum.
" global offshore crude oil contributes 70 percent new discoveries, China' offshore resources set play increasingly vital role energy security," said.
Industry experts believe investment offshore oil gas exploration expected increase, half year' domestic oil increment likely come offshore sources.
China' offshore oil gas production expected rise, country' ongoing investment focus upstream production crucial ensuring energy security, said Li Ziyue, analyst BloombergNEF.
Natural gas, often hailed transition fuel journey low-carbon future, seen steady production increases China.
CNPC institute expects annual natural gas output rise 250 billion cubic meters currently 310 billion cubic meters 2035, growth projected through 2060.
combination domestic natural gas development adoption new technologies like coal gasification ensures gas remain cornerstone China' energy system, said Wu.
Wu said China tapping unconventional resources expand energy supply, significant advancements shale gas exploration coalbed methane extraction currently reshaping country' resource landscape.
untapped reserves, low-maturity shale oil underground coal gasification, could unleash vast new potential coming decades, said.
"Unconventional resources see exponential growth continued technological breakthroughs," said Li Guoxin, deputy chief geologist CNPC. "These resources only enhance self-sufficiency, provide buffer against external market uncertainties."
oil gas remain critical, China' energy demand undergoing transformative shift. country' leadership renewable energy, particularly wind solar power, set stage multifaceted energy structure 2060, said Wu.
Currently, coal accounts 55 percent energy mix, oil natural gas 18 percent 9 percent, respectively. mid-century, renewables expected dominate, accounting nearly 80 percent energy portfolio, said.
"Fossil fuels transition serve safety net source key materials, non-fossil fuels become backbone energy supply," Wu said.
Under circumstance, CNPC institute expects country' oil consumption peak around 2025 770 million tons, five earlier previous estimates.
China' oil demand reached historic turning point. 2023, oil consumption transportation peaked, driven rapid adoption electric vehicles advances public transit electrification.
long term, oil' role China increasingly pivot toward industrial chemical applications. 2060, petrochemical feedstocks projected account 60 percent oil consumption, 50 percent today. Meanwhile, transportation fuel use decline less 20 percent, said.
" rise renewable energy manufacturing, relies heavily petrochemical materials, ensures oil remain indispensable decades come," said Wu.
Despite fact China emerged powerhouse scaling renewable energy systems, non-fossil energy production expected surpass 5 billion tons standard coal equivalent 2060, making nearly 80 percent energy mix, oil gas remain indispensable near term, said.
" bold ambitions clear roadmap, China' energy sector stands forefront transformative - define country' economic environmental legacy generations come," said Wu. " sheer scale industrial transportation needs, coupled current limitations renewables, means fossil fuels still vital foreseeable future."
China stepped international cooperation oil sector 2024, expanding partnerships key energy-producing countries secure stable supplies enhance technological collaboration.
China' three State-owned oil giants - China Petroleum Chemical Corp, CNPC CNOOC - ramped efforts strengthen international collaboration oil gas development throughout past, increasing focus transitioning green energy.
Dai Houliang, chairman CNPC, said oil sector should expand oil gas cooperation jointly secure global energy supplies emphasizing importance increasing openness collaboration accelerate transformation upgrade efforts.
emphasis expanding oil gas cooperation remains critical ensuring global energy security amid growing demand geopolitical uncertainty, said Wang Lining, director oil market department under economics technology research institute CNPC.
Deepening collaboration serves strategic buffer against volatility induced geopolitical uncertainties market disruptions. approach reinforces energy diversification, supply chain resilience, long-term sustainability face shifting geopolitical economic dynamics, added.

#18
China' energy law, fully take effect Jan 1, 2025, set fortify legal framework within energy sector, ensuring national energy security catalyzing shift toward green low-carbon practices, experts said Monday.
energy law approved early November 12th session Standing Committee 14th National People' Congress, China' top legislature.
includes nine sections, covering stipulations energy planning, development utilization, energy market systems, energy reserves emergency measures, energy technology innovation, supervision management, legal responsibilities supplementary provisions among others.
Experts noted world' largest energy producer consumer, China long lacked fundamental overarching energy law. introduction energy law fill legislative gap, significantly strengthening legal foundation energy sector, ensuring national energy security promoting green low-carbon transformation.
Prior development, China had enacted individual laws energy domain laws coal, electricity, energy conservation renewable energy.
Wang Peng, professor North China Electric Power University, highlighted energy law bolster impetus green consumption.
" establishes clear objectives green energy advancement delineates responsibilities involved entities. Moreover, articulates precise requirements various renewable energy types including hydropower, wind energy, solar energy," Wang said.
" instance, development utilization wind solar energy, law requires combination both centralized distributed systems lays legal foundation distributed power trading, microgrids innovative business models," added.
Wang emphasized new energy law fortifies institutional support green energy consumption. Article 34 advocates establishment mechanisms, green electricity certificates, incentivize propel green energy consumption.
Green electricity certificates serve electronic IDs green power transactions China. Each certificate represents 1,000 kilowatt-hours green power generated renewable sources.
Jing Chunmei, director energy, green low-carbon development research department China Center International Economic Exchanges, underscored necessity foundational comprehensive energy law China, especially context evolving energy security climate change challenges global scale.
latest data National Energy Administration showed country had achieved major milestone renewable energy development installations wind solar power generating units surpassing 1.2 billion kilowatts end-July, six ahead schedule.
" law designed top-level perspective establish strategic goals policy direction China' energy development, clarify rights obligations various entities, provide legal safeguards China' energy security energy transition, help promote establishment just, fair equitable global energy system," Jing said.

Strategic collaboration
cooperation between CNPC Abu Dhabi National Oil Company (ADNOC), dates back 2007, when subsidiary, China Petroleum Engineering & Construction Corporation (CPECC), became contractor Abu Dhabi Crude Oil Pipeline project. Initially, UAE served transit hub CNPC, facilitating material supply broader Middle East North Africa region. However, strategic partnership agreement signed 2012 significantly expanded cooperation. Since 2013, CNPC ADNOC formalized partnerships across major oilfields like Al Yasat, Onshore, Umm Shaif & Nasr, Lower Zakum, establishing broad collaboration oil gas exploration development, engineering, equipment supply, technical services. renewed strategic agreement 2024 ushered new phase partnership, CNPC reinforcing technical prowess earning UAE' trust.
Comprehensive partnership
CNPC' partnership UAE spans entire oil gas value chain, encompassing exploration, development, equipment exports, engineering, technical services. corporation' extensive activities contribute significantly UAE' economic industrial growth. Currently, CNPC' operations UAE include investments oil trade, natural gas supply, equipment logistics, research. Notably 2018, BGP, subsidiary CNPC, entered contract ADNOC world' largest onshore offshore 3D seismic survey, marking significant milestone China-UAE cooperation. CNPC instrumental boosting UAE' oil production. CPECC, another wholly-owned subsidiary CNPC, helped raise capacity ADNOC' BAB Onshore Oilfield 1.4 million barrels 1.8 million barrels per day.

noted Geely exploring methanol energy source 20, viewing sustainable solution produced surplus wind solar power, reducing dependence fossil fuels.
Li outlined Geely' plans leverage methanol various sectors, including commercial maritime applications, where provides efficient, low-emission alternative conventional fuels.
Highlighting recent advances, Li said Geely' methanol-powered vehicles offer "significant reductions emissions compared traditional diesel trucks", positioned them viable choice high-emission sectors logistics public transportation.
Compared diesel trucks meet National VI standards, strictest China, Geely' methanol-hydrogen EVs significantly reduce emissions. They achieved 98 percent reduction particulate matter, 88 percent decrease carbon monoxide, 82 percent reduction nitrogen oxides.
Geely just kicked off green methanol project Alxa League, Inner Mongolia, annual production capacity 500,000 metric tons, starting phase 100,000 tons.
Li said project expected reduce carbon dioxide emissions approximately 150,000 tons per, equivalent reforesting 150,000 acres land.
Shi Jianhua, deputy secretary-general China EV100, automotive think tank, argued methanol fuel particularly suited commercial vehicles, where cost-effectiveness reliability paramount.
According Shi, methanol-based solutions " meet operational demands commercial vehicle users better battery-electric technology, especially long-haul routes".
advocated diversified approach vehicle electrification, including methanol, hydrogen hybrids, meet China' extensive logistics needs.
Yao Chunde, deputy director Methanol Vehicle Expert Advisory Committee under Ministry Industry Information Technology, pointed out China' strategic advantage world' largest methanol producer.
emphasized methanol' potential replacement petroleum-based fuels, particularly transportation. Yao said "expanding methanol' role vehicle fuels drive China' energy transition reduce reliance imported oil".
China currently accounts -thirds global methanol demand shipyards building 70 percent world' methanol-powered vessels.
" three-quarters new renewable methanol capacity expected added China 2026, next few pivotal methanol industry," said Greg Dolan, CEO Methanol Institute.

shipment Chinese energy giant highlights potential hydrogen sustainable energy source country' leadership advancing hydrogen logistics clean energy technology, said industry experts.

China Photovoltaic Industry Association (CPIA) said Monday sector should enhance self-discipline, avoid unhealthy competition, resolve supply-demand imbalances eliminate excess capacity orderly manner.
hosted special forum Shanghai industry representatives agreed measures promote fair competition, phase out inefficient capacity ensure sustainable development.
Since, photovoltaic upstream polysilicon sector faced "price collapse" due supply-demand imbalances, resulting significant losses companies. Currently, prices polysilicon, wafers, cells modules fallen below cash production costs, putting pressure entire value chain.
Liu Hanyuan, chairman new energy company Tongwei Co Ltd, said slowdown industry growth led oversupply falling prices, exacerbated intensified competition. result, each segment incurring losses, extended supply chain amplifying these challenges.
Despite threefold expansion capacity, industry profit margins decreased 70 percent, according media outlet Yicai.com.
" root unhealthy competition lies limited market growth," said Lu Chuan, chairman Chint Solar, suggesting companies restrain expansion pricing avoid price wars, industry associations regulatory bodies should guide production capacity pricing mechanisms stabilize sector.
When existing markets no longer support survival growth companies, lower-tier competition becomes inevitable choice. However, type competition fails drive overall industry progress. Instead, leads resource misallocation, stifles innovation ultimately harms sector' sustainable development, Lu said.
Analysts recommend stabilizing market promoting advanced technologies through demonstration projects moving beyond low-bid competition strategies. They emphasize strengthening self-discipline implementing regulatory oversight essential achieving sustainable growth protecting vitality industry.
Nicholas Lua, analyst global consultancy Rystad Energy, said global solar market currently faces oversupply situation.
Market consolidation China could well horizon smaller less efficient solar manufacturers exit market, said.
third quarter already seen multiple small domestic manufacturers undergo restructuring, examples expected coming months, Lua said.

hand, solar wafers polysilicon made China seen record-low prices quarter, added.

Kenya pioneers efforts

made Kenya biggest investors renewable clean energy home largest grid-connected solar power plant East Central Africa.

#61
Communist Party China Central Committee State Council released guidelines aimed accelerating green transition country' socioeconomic development.
guidelines set ambitious goals, including achieving "remarkable results" green transition 2030 establishing green, low-carbon circular economic system 2035 part efforts achieve vision "Beautiful China".
They outline series tasks, optimizing land use, promoting green low-carbon industrial energy transitions, advancing sustainable urban-rural development. Specific targets include expanding value energy conservation environmental protection industry 15 trillion yuan ($2.1 trillion) increasing share non-fossil energy 25 percent total energy consumption 2030.
Additional goals include reducing carbon emissions intensity commercial transport 9.5 percent boosting annual utilization bulk solid waste 4.5 billion metric tons 2030.
National Development Reform Commission said guidelines were issued following significant progress green low-carbon development since 18th CPC National Congress 2012.
June, renewable energy accounted 53.8 percent China' total installed electricity generation capacity. Energy consumption per unit GDP down 26 percent level 2012, carbon emissions intensity per unit GDP down 35 percent.
However, NDRC acknowledged ongoing challenges, nation' continued reliance coal high proportion fossil fuels energy mix. global green transition faces setbacks, environmental climate issues becoming increasingly politicized, green trade barriers escalating.
China pursue supportive fiscal taxation policies promote green low-carbon development develop financial instruments green equity financing green financial leasing.
Experts highlighted importance comprehensive approach green transition, focusing both supply demand. Lin Boqiang, director China Institute Studies Energy Policy Xiamen University, emphasized need address rapid growth energy demand alongside expansion renewable energy production.
" new energy growing rapidly, fossil fuel use increasing," Lin said. " accelerate green transformation, effort needed demand side."
Zhang Jianhua, director National Energy Administration, told news conference June China' energy supply grown nearly 20 percent since start 14th Five- Plan (2021-2025). ongoing industrialization urbanization, energy demand expected continue rising.
Lin said: " growth energy demand closely related industrial development people' lifestyles. Increasing energy prices most effective ways mitigate growth energy demand, might worth trying.
" example, electricity price China much lower actual cost China government subsidies. development process past few decades, needed ensure people had access electricity. However, economic development, price electricity considered adjustment.
" increase energy prices may restraining effect industrial development. What need do generate GDP less energy."
Lin said China' energy policy formulated based specific national conditions.
"Income levels, development stages industrial chains vary among different countries, so there no comparability terms energy policies," Lin said.
"China still significant room improvement energy conservation emission reduction should adjust industrial structure according actual circumstances."

#84
Recently, United States some European countries hyping false narrative China' "overcapacity", accusing country "flooding" global market cheap new energy products. Nonetheless, so-called China' "overcapacity" something new. Why do they keep repeating old rhetoric? What hidden motives?
Aiming hit china' new energy industry
"overcapacity" accusation overlooks market demand, well strong potential global new energy industry. runs counter law economics international trade rules.
Blaming China "overcapacity" new.
20 ago, shortly after China' accession World Trade Organization (WTO), China' export high-quality products affordable prices deemed some threats, said Zheng Yongnian, director Advanced Institute Global Contemporary China Studies Chinese University Hong Kong (Shenzhen).
so-called China' "overcapacity" fact new variant "China threat" theory, turns economic trade issues political, security ideological issues, said Zheng.
Fearing products maintain position top value chain international trade, intends give itself unfair advantage market competition curbing suppressing China' emerging industries, said John Ross, former director economic business policy mayor London.
Therefore, "overcapacity" accusation, essence, new narrative attack China, It' another example economic coercion bullying.
Customary practice maintain hegemony
Looking back history, any country labeled "harming" industrial interest, had suppressed various ways.
Since middle century, Japan' textile, automobile, semiconductor industries expanded, conducted crackdowns Japan' related industries, adopting anti-dumping tariffs, forcing Japan voluntarily restrict exports expand imports, among others, said Jin Ruiting, researcher Institute Macroeconomic Research National Development Reform Commission.
Today, playing same old trick again -- using trade protectionism alleviate "hegemony anxiety". lose-lose approach solve own problems, negative impact development global clean energy industry chain.
Political pandering
hold presidential election. Joe Biden administration' continuous hype around China' "overcapacity" could seen attempt secure support labor unions.
Statistics indicate eight top ten lithium-ion battery manufacturers, eight top 12 photovoltaic companies, top three NEV manufacturers situated states won President Biden election.
These companies affiliated prominent unions, including United Auto Workers Laborers' International Union North America, endorsed Biden' reelection bid. Consequently, garnering support both public key industries these states crucial success Biden' electoral campaign.
Office United States Trade Representative recently initiated Section 301 investigation China' maritime, logistics shipbuilding industries following petition labor unions, alleging China utilized "unfair, non-market policies practices" gain dominance these sectors. presidential election draws near, no surprise blamed China own industrial problems.
Although government asserts trade policy "worker-centered", recent moves, including hyping China' "overcapacity" launching trade investigations against China, appear prioritize voter appeal economic considerations, said Yao Yang, director China Center Economic Research Peking University.
Deepening reform opening
Facing these groundless accusations West, China should unswervingly deepen reform opening, experts said.
present, China built world' largest, most complete most competitive clean energy industrial chain. helped stabilize global industrial supply chain, enriching global supply easing global inflationary pressure.
China' electric vehicles, lithium batteries photovoltaic products, only meet growing global demand green consumption, assist many countries green energy transition, said Li Dawei, director Emerging Economies Research Office Institute Foreign Economic Studies China Academy Macroeconomic Research.
"overcapacity" fallacy impede ongoing transformation upgrading China' industries. China' new energy products play important role driving global low-carbon energy transition.

lithium iron phosphate battery (LFP), Shenxing Plus, able power journey 600 kilometers after mere 10-minute charge. LFP batteries environmentally friendlier cheaper lithium-ion batteries commonly used EVs.
Gao Huan, chief technology officer CATL' e-car business, said upgraded battery able power 1,000 km full charge, means trip Beijing Nanjing, Jiangsu province, possible without recharging road.
move comes just months after company launched fast-charging battery able deliver driving range 400 km 10-minute charge August.

industry made significant advancements technical innovation 14th Five- Plan period (2021-25), said.

#99
Expanding use green hydrogen, ammonia ethanol crucial China achieve deep cuts carbon emissions ensuring domestic energy security, future growth power generation mainly come nonfossil resources, according political advisers industry experts.
China, being world' largest producer consumer hydrogen ammonia, holds significant strategic importance fostering development sustainable green hydrogen, ethanol ammonia, said Jiang Yi, chairman China Huadian Corp Ltd, who member 14th National Committee Chinese People' Political Consultative Conference.
Jiang suggested comprehensive research policy support, market mechanisms standard systems hydrogen, ethanol ammonia sectors drive commercial-scale development application "new energy+hydrogen/ethanol/ammonia-based energy".
process producing hydrogen, ethanol ammonia renewable energy resources using them carrier energy storage, later converted back electricity, considered pivotal option deep decarbonization terminal end. They gaining international attention potential emissions-free fuel.
Currently, hydrogen mainly produced carbon dioxide natural gas without using carbon capture, utilization storage technology. therefore generates massive carbon emissions process, known "gray hydrogen".
"Blue hydrogen" carbon emissions captured stored, reused.
Just like hydrogen, there several different types ammonia, depending energy used production. Green ammonia - produced using wind, solar hydropower - becoming most preferable form fuel carbon-free.
China' national emissions trading scheme (ETS) currently covers only power generation enterprises. Sectors chemicals steel, strongly associated widespread application green hydrogen, ethanol ammonia, included.
Experts believe green hydrogen, ethanol ammonia could key success country' carbon peak neutrality goals, aim peak carbon emissions 2030 achieve carbon neutrality 2060.
clear demand potential use various industries, green hydrogen, ethanol ammonia gaining increasing attention governments companies looking shift away fossil fuels renewable alternatives, said Luo Zuoxian, head intelligence research Sinopec Economics Development Research Institute.
Seeing potential green hydrogen, ethanol ammonia, governments across world exploring variety renewable sources decarbonize transport sectors areas. Luo believes green hydrogen, ammonia ethanol emerging clean versatile fuel potential revolutionize various sectors.
hand, China' green hydrogen production costs declining result increased technological breakthroughs, greater investment supports innovations technologies help reduce production costs, said Luo.
China currently world' largest hydrogen producer consumer, substantial room development, said.
Wu Mouyuan, vice-president China National Petroleum Corp Economics Technology Research Institute, said hydrogen' ability produce energy without emitting CO2 makes promising solution decarbonizing sectors challenging directly electrify, heavy industry, aviation long-haul overland transport.
serving clean fuel alternative, hydrogen replace traditional fossil fuels playing crucial role consuming storing renewable energy, making indispensable energy alternative achieving deep emissions reductions terminal stage, Wu said.
Jiang said Huadian aims step new energy project construction, including solar offshore wind power, amid country' green energy transition.
eyes establishing integrated energy industry supply chain covers hydrogen, energy storage carbon trade, accelerating technological research innovation integrate digital technologies artificial intelligence energy production, so foster new high-quality productive forces, said.

Solar energy, no fuel costs low maintenance costs, developing rapidly China' rural regions past few, created savings rural communities replacing expensive inefficient traditional fuels, said Zhong Baoshen, chairman Longi Green Energy Technology Co.
potential revolutionize energy landscape China' rural regions, enabling millions people access clean sustainable power, driver toward net-zero world, said Zhong, who deputy 14th National People' Congress.
However, despite rapid expansion, sector marred various irregularities, including inconsistent component quality inadequate corrosion prevention measures crucial elements, well lack proper infrastructure grid connectivity transmission lines distribute solar energy effectively, said.
varying quality photovoltaic components, coupled lack maintenance management solar products rural regions, pose risks overall construction quality solar power stations rural areas, leading operational challenges potential safety hazards, said Zhong.
called comprehensive policies national level address current regulatory gaps ensure long-term sustainability reliability rural photovoltaic sector.
absence dedicated operational maintenance framework tailored specifically rural photovoltaic installations makes difficult make better use solar power, urgent country formulate comprehensive policies address gap, ensuring development high-quality standards construction implementation rural photovoltaic projects, said.
According guideline underpinning green development urban rural areas released State Council, 2035 green development cover urban rural areas comprehensive way, increased cut carbon emissions.
China' rural areas, encompassing 90 percent nation' total land area, hold immense potential development rural photovoltaics. new era, photovoltaics only empower vitalization rural industries contribute shared prosperity, provide robust driving force green, low-carbon development construction beautiful rural landscapes, said Zhong.
Figures released renewable energy center National Development Reform Commission' energy research institute show China' newly added distributed photovoltaic capacity reached 96.29 gigawatts, marking 88 percent -- growth. cumulative installed capacity distributed photovoltaics stands 253 gigawatts so far, constituting 42 percent total installed capacity photovoltaics country, said.

past few decades, coal-fired power plants powered factories warmed homes across country, boosting China' energy market.
Dagang power plant Tianjin, pivotal player national energy landscape since commissioning unit 1978,.
plant, once largest single-unit capacity thermal power generator China, fostered industrial growth supported economic development North China decades stable ample power supply.
However, China accelerated green low-carbon energy transition bid achieve carbon peak before 2030 carbon neutrality before 2060, Dagang power station, operated China Energy Investment Corp, world' leading coal supplier, decided adopt sustainable practices advanced technology.
power plant currently undergoing technological upgrades aimed enhancing overall efficiency introduced advanced equipment maximize energy output minimizing environmental impact.
replace four 328-megawatt units, power station constructing high-efficiency ultra-supercritical coal-fired cogeneration units, each capacity 660 MW.
units employ comprehensive dust removal measures. Emissions sulfur, nitrogen particulate matter significantly lower national standards, said.
Additionally, units' cooling method enable zero emissions solid waste warm water discharge facilitate marine ecological preservation.
Compared existing units, replacement reduce burning 300,000 metric tons coal per, cutting carbon dioxide emissions approximately 700,000 tons, said Wang Song, chairman Dagang power station.
planned replacement project completed preliminary supporting documents policy procedures scheduled start October. Upon completion, these projects expected provide heating area 28 million square meters, said.
bid diversify energy sources, plant incorporated renewable energy solutions solar power. Distributed solar panels now dotting landscape surrounding facility, harnessing natural resources generate sustainable electricity.
Since became connected grid 2021, 3.78-MW distributed photovoltaic system within station generated around 5.03 million kilowatt-hours, reducing carbon dioxide emissions around 4,200 tons.
China plans phase down coal usage between 2026 2030, many facilities like Dagang power plant implementing advanced technologies reduce emissions adopting energy-efficient practices, said Lin Boqiang, head China Institute Studies Energy Policy Xiamen University.

installed capacity wind solar power exceed coal-fired electricity account 40 percent total installed capacity end, according China Electricity Council.

annual coal production reached 620 million tons, coal sales reaching 830 million tons, contributing -sixth national total, ensuring stable domestic energy supply, said.

#114
Viewed distance, Lianxing looks like solar energy farm rural village 457 households. There solar photovoltaic panels almost rooftops every courtyard.
generations, residents village Wuyuan county, Inner Mongolia autonomous region, depended straw, firewood coal cooking heating.
they now abandoned those fuels, often made homes dirty, 40--old villager Shi Baohong said.
new power generation facilities brought villagers consistent stream income little effort. Shi earns almost 10,000 yuan ($1,400) his solar PV panels said there still enough space between them plant herbs cash crops his courtyard 300 square meters.
China forges ahead energy transition rural vitalization, Lianxing almost 1,400 residents microcosm synergy generated when campaigns promoted simultaneously.
Different development modes emerged, rural residents being major beneficiaries.
National Energy Administration said installed capacity household distributed solar PV power generation reached 105 gigawatts end September. That' four times capacity Three Gorges Dam project - world' largest hydropower facility.
date, 5 million rural households covered distributed power generation facilities - systems installed close place electricity used. rapid development only boosted energy transformation, driven growth farmers' incomes, administration said November.
said roughly half growth capacity distributed solar PV three quarters - almost 33 GW - contributed household panels.
administration noted huge potential distributed solar PV power development rural China, saying almost 27.3 billion square meters rooftops belonging 80 million rural households suitable sites panels.
vowed promote "whole-county" distributed solar PV development pilot program part efforts drive even greater adoption.
Launched three ago 676 pilot county-level areas, program aims tap potential rooftops government public buildings, industrial commercial complexes rural homes distributed solar PV development.
Local authorities said distributed solar PV system Lianxing went operation 2017, three after villagers moved new homes fitted solar panels. Households village now make average 8,000 yuan selling solar energy grid.
Villagers did pay new houses power generation facilities thanks land-use rights transfer project. After resettlement, land previously covered villagers' old, dilapidated houses turned 130 hectares farmland.
costs new houses solar panels were covered company invested large-scale agricultural development project.
"Villagers didn't pay even single penny. house--house deal, that' half bad," village' Party chief, Li Chou, said.
said people nearby rural communities impressed progress made Lianxing' residents after seeing way distributed solar PV program resulted significant transformation village' living environment.
" village spotlessly clean. So every household," Li said.
vast stretches desert wasteland, Inner Mongolia particularly suitable large-scale, concentrated solar PV energy development, region made continued progress household solar PV installation.
Inner Mongolia' distributed solar power generation capacity increased 400 megawatts three quarters, National Energy Administration said. took total region 1.6 GW, quarter contributed household panels.
neighboring province Gansu seen remarkable progress household solar PV adoption. some rural residents paid installation themselves, many others were offered another option - leasing rooftops solar energy development companies.
Liang Hongqi, Dujiahe village Hezheng county, Gansu, learned distributed solar PV internet 2017.
After local grid company told him preferential prices could lower cost installing solar PV power generation system his home, could sell surplus power generated grid, 59--old quickly decided spend 34,000 yuan put his rooftop.
His six-member family, usually consumes 120 kilowatt-hours electricity month, now enjoys free power supply, Liang said, adding made 24,500 yuan sales local grid.
service life distributed solar power system usually 20 25, workers local grid company inspect his system regularly.
"What I need do occasionally clean PV panels ensure power generation capability disrupted sand dust," said.

#128
IMF seeks efforts avoid frittering away past gains fragmented world
geoeconomic fragmentation increasingly becoming reality, world needs protect economic cooperation multilateral trading system avoid " annihilation gains" open trade could result another Cold War, senior official International Monetary Fund said Monday.
Speaking 20th World Congress International Economic Association Medellin, Colombia, Gita Gopinath, deputy managing director IMF, said national security concerns shaping economic policies worldwide, past five, threats free flow capital goods intensified geopolitical risks grown.
Those include measures tariffs export restrictions, directly target trade investment, addition behind--border measures indirectly affect trade flows.
alone, around 3,000 trade-restricting measures were imposed, nearly three times number 2019, according IMF official.
" there no signs broad-based retreat globalization, fault lines emerging geoeconomic fragmentation increasingly reality. If fragmentation deepens, could find ourselves new Cold War," she said.
Gopinath said attempting "de-risking" supply chains could potentially reverse nearly three decades peace, integration growth helped lift billions out poverty.
latest World Economic Outlook released early October, IMF predicted global growth would fall 3.5 percent 2022 3 percent 2023 2.9 percent 2024.
" weakest global growth prospects decades - disproportionate scarring pandemic war slowing income convergence between rich poor nations - little afford another Cold War," she said.
Marketplace integration
Compared Cold War period, degree economic interdependence between countries now higher, economies become much integrated global marketplace through complex global value chains, according Gopinath.
"(Share ) global trade GDP now 60 percent compared 24 percent Cold War. likely raise costs fragmentation," she added.
Citing analyses researchers leading institutions, including Princeton University Columbia University, Gopinath said trade restrictions imposed since start -China trade war 2018 "effectively" curbed Chinese imports.
China' share imports fallen almost 10 percentage points five : 22 percent 2018 13 percent half 2023.
IMF working paper fragmentation global trade, released March, concluded fragmentation-induced output losses "sizable".
Global output losses estimated fall between 0.3 percent 2.3 percent long run depending fragmentation scenario, severe scenario incurring 7 percent GDP loss, according research conducted Marijn. Bolhuis, IMF economist, his colleagues.
Gopinath said fragmentation would inhibit world' efforts address global challenges demand international cooperation. breadth those challenges - climate change AI - immense.
" best solution, course, avoid fragmentation., time being, may difficult achieve," she said. " must work avoid worst-case scenario protect economic cooperation fragmented world."
Among ways out, IMF official suggested multilateral approach " very least" areas common interest.
example, green-corridor agreement could guarantee international flow minerals critical clean energy transition. Similar agreements essential food commodities medical supplies could ensure minimum cross-border flows increasingly "shock-prone world".
agreements would safeguard global goals averting climate change devastation, food insecurity, pandemic-related humanitarian disasters, she said.

line Hong Kong' go-green policies, SAR authorities power companies aim stop using coal generate power, black solid fuel contributes 44 percent global carbon dioxide emissions. power firms import natural gas substitutes coal. July, new offshore liquefied natural gas terminal began operating east Soko Islands, few kilometers southwest Lantau Island. station, co-owned CLP Hong Kong Electric, enables Hong Kong buy receive natural gas globally.

scale renewable energy use city less 1 percent electricity needed - lagging behind economies populations similar Hong Kong.
Belgium, population 11.59 million, 12 percent energy consumes generated wind solar photovoltaics. third power used 6.8 million people Serbia Balkan Peninsula comes renewables.

says believes mainland' resources help Hong Kong narrow gap regions green energy transition. " northwestern regions mainland rich solar wind energies," Lo notes.
mainland, 85 percent wind energy 90 percent solar energy come western regions. After meeting local demands, electricity surplus produced renewable energies, through west--east power transmission program, transmitted eastern regions rely heavily electricity support economic growth.
2022, Guangdong province received 200 billion kilowatt-hours western regions, 80 percent generated renewable energies, solar power hydropower. average, green power helps cities Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area cut coal consumption 57 million metric tons annually.

Technical obstacles
Under climate action plan, SAR government pledged lift proportion renewable energies power generation between 7.5 10 percent before 2035. end, local companies scientists actively exploring potential hydrogen.
Citybus - Hong Kong' public bus operators - launched local hydrogen refueling station Nov 30 serve planned hydrogen bus fleet. company' double-decker hydrogen bus expected enter service Kowloon next month.
Despite progress made using hydrogen, production remains huge barrier. Unlike petroleum sunlight, hydrogen can't mined captured directly nature. Instead, mainstream ways making hydrogen involve conversion natural gases water. It' hard both achieve net-zero emissions under current level technology.
Hydrogen extracted natural gas, process still pollutant, therefore, hydrogen produced way called "gray hydrogen", denoting polluted way production.
Towngas - Hong Kong' sole citywide piped gas supplier - says it' mulling experimental project Sai Kung using hydrogen separated piped gas generate electricity supplying designated venues electric vehicles.
says hydrogen separated piped gas categorized gray hydrogen. result, company exploring carbon capture technology - capturing reusing carbon dioxide emitted combustion - reduce greenhouse gas emissions hydrogen production.
better way produce hydrogen use electricity split water oxygen hydrogen gases. Hydrogen produced way called "green hydrogen". electricity produced should zero-carbon emissions too.
Then, it' chicken--egg problem. Power companies need green hydrogen generate green electricity. electrolysis method requires green electricity produce green hydrogen. Moreover, nine liters fresh water required average produce kilogram hydrogen via electrolysis. consumption great challenge places lacking fresh water resources, Hong Kong.
Scientists trying find solution. Ng Yun-hau, professor School Energy Environment City University Hong Kong, discovered method produce hydrogen visible lights splitting water. His research team developed photocatalyst chemically react lights, allowing beams split hydrogen water.
water-splitting process similar photosynthesis plants, trees bushes absorb sunlight, water carbon dioxide create oxygen energies.
Ng' findings earned him 2019 Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation Science Prize Innovation, Research Education.
says research enable method applied sewage too so would consume lot fresh water photocatalytic system scaled.
Local photovoltaic power generation good supplement city' energy strategy. Many local enterprises installed photovoltaic panels parking lots rooftops generate power.
Hong Kong Disneyland Resort built largest solar energy system town. 7,500 panels installed resort' 47 locations supply power facilities. system generates 3.3 million kWh electricity each, equivalent energy consumption 1,000 three-person households, resort told China Daily.
Technicians resort use smart management system monitor operation use each solar panel real time ensure stability solar power supply system maximize efficiency.

mainland opened national carbon market ago. late, market' cumulative volume carbon emission allowances, meaning permission emit carbon, turnover reached 223 million metric tons 10.12 billion yuan ($1.42 billion) respectively.
However, Hong Kong' inclusion mainland' carbon trading market may ideal, says Lawrence Iu Chun-yip, executive director Civic Exchange - Hong Kong think tank focusing environmental challenges.
explains allowing carbon trading may trigger higher electricity bills power companies need buy carbon emission allowances every unit electricity they produce fossil energies. additional costs eventually passed consumers.
Instead, Iu says believes Hong Kong' financial sector help green energy projects Greater Bay Area through fundraising.
part government' efforts promote green finance, Hong Kong Monetary Authority drafting Prototype Green Classification Framework city define sustainable economic activities established local green finance criteria line international standards.

center innovation East China producing world-leading technological breakthroughs. Zhu Lixin reports Hefei.
Earlier, China' "artificial sun", experimental device designed harness energy nuclear fusion, achieved major technological breakthrough laid solid foundation toward operation fusion reactor.
" Experimental Advanced Superconducting Tokamak - aka EAST, 'artificial sun' - aims unlock secret behind nuclear fusion; same mechanism powers sun," said Hu Jiahui, engineer Institute Plasma Physics Chinese Academy Sciences.
instrument, located "Science Island", complex Hefei, capital eastern province Anhui, set numerous world records nuclear fusion technology.
giant machine simulates conditions nuclear fusion sun creating ultra-high-temperature plasma, most abundant form ordinary matter universe. " plasma temperature machine reach 160 million C. contrast, core temperature sun 15 million C," Hu said.
Unlike fossil fuels coal, oil natural gas, limited supply damaging environmental impacts, supplies raw materials needed operation "artificial sun" - tritium deuterium - almost unlimited world' oceans.
" energy released fusion deuterium contained liter seawater equivalent energy 300 liters gasoline," Hu said, adding fusion energy safer cleaner traditional energy sources, thus considered ideal "ultimate energy" future humanity.
EAST, designed constructed Chinese scientists, makes China country build device own. may still take people use energy produced facility, some technological improvements already brought green energy people' everyday lives.
April, residents Taoxi New Village Community Hefei' Changfeng county began using electricity produced solar power photovoltaic panels installed roofs local buildings, provide steady stream clean electricity.

energy produced PV panels enough meet needs community' residents, any surplus power generated fed public grid, helps alleviate pressure network periods peak power consumption, Zhang said.

School Chemistry Materials Science University Science Technology China Hefei, researchers researching perovskite solar panels, perovskite type inexpensive solar cell usually hybrid organic-inorganic lead tin halide-based material light-harvesting active layer, greatly increase conversion efficiency sunlight electricity.
" perovskite layer, only 1 micrometer thick, like 'skin' 'apple' crystalline silicon, dominant semiconducting material used photovoltaic technology, 200 micrometers thick," said Xu Jixian, professor school.
cutting-edge technology solar power generation, perovskite solar cell greatly boosted light-electricity conversion efficiency rate 25 percent 30 percent, said Xu, adding figure just 3.8 percent 2009.

#142
'Laggard' China powers ahead renewable energy
Policy support, innovation strong investment seen country leapfrog global competitors. Hou Liqiang reports.
four decades ago, lacking necessary technology research development capabilities, China only able manufacture micro turbines off-grid power generation.
stark contrast, however, news giant leap forward China' wind power development repeatedly hit headlines past.
February, 13-megawatt offshore wind turbine, had largest single-unit capacity Asia time, rolled off production line Fujian province.
Only nine months later, facility dwarfed 16-MW offshore wind turbine, assembled Fujian led world terms single-unit capacity. June, 20-MW wind turbine produced Shandong province set another record.
contrast indicative significant progress China made development renewable energy laggard leader, helped sharply bring down cost renewables, experts said.
achievement easy, China accumulated vast experiences instructive nations, especially developing states, promoting energy transition large scale, they said.
Consistent comprehensive policy support great importance attached capacity building production standards among factors helped China top world renewables, they added.
According National Energy Administration, total capacity grid-connected wind turbines across China only stood 1.06 million kilowatts 2005. end, capacity had soared 365 million KW.
period, China saw combined installed capacity photovoltaic power jump just 70,000 KW 392 million KW. proportion global total skyrocketed less 1.4 percent 33 percent.
end June, installed capacity renewable energy China had exceeded 1.3 billion KW, surpassing installed capacity coal-fired power time.
Policy-driven process
development large-scale renewable energy China significantly brought down global cost renewables, said Wang Weiquan, deputy secretary-general Chinese Renewable Energy Industries Association. "China deserves credit," said.
Thanks China' contribution, cost photovoltaic power generation now low 1 cent 1 kilowatt-hour electricity Middle East, where costs land use financing relatively low, said.
Wang attributed remarkable achievement consistent, systematic tailor-made policies introduced different development stages. " sound system renewable energy development," said.
Driven these policies, broad market renewable energy development formed. then boosted development upstream manufacturing industries entire industry chain, noted, citing subsidized price renewable energy, feed- tariff, example.
feed- tariff - surcharge electricity bills - guaranteed solar wind companies above-market prices energy, helped attract large number investors sector, added.
China introduced dedicated renewable energy law 2005, incorporated renewable energy development five- plans since 1996, established sound mechanism guarantee absorption newly added renewable energy output, Wang said.
another move, country set Renewable Energy Development Fund support development sector, added.
2009, country' top legislature amended Law Renewable Energy require electricity grid companies buy power produced renewable energy generators.
Winds change
Hou Yuhan, group marketing director Goldwind Science & Technology, leading Chinese wind turbine manufacturer, underscored importance "continuity, stability sustainability" country' policies development wind energy sector.
"Since 1990s, China' central regional governments introduced slew policies concerning renewable energy sector, creating stable policy environment favorable conditions wind energy development," she said.
Hou added introduction China' dual-carbon targets 2020 national policy framework implement goals " propelled renewable energy sector key development stage".
2020, China announced aimed peak carbon dioxide emissions before 2030 realize carbon neutrality before 2060.
country released raft new policies guide energy transition, prioritized green, low-carbon energy development, scientific technological innovation, institutional innovation, regulatory efficiency international cooperation, Hou said.
Du Zhongming, president China Electric Power Planning & Engineering Institute, said China dynamically adjusted policies concerning renewable energy.
"Based situations needs different development stages, these policies adjusted accordingly make best use circumstances," said.
technology develops economic efficiency improves renewable energy sector, instance, subsidies renewable energy China were gradually reduced, said.

#158
Experts expect bigger role energy nation' green transition
Nuclear power playing prominent role helping achieve China' carbon neutrality goals, proportion country' total electricity generation climb come, according industry association.
China' nuclear power generation account 10 percent country' total electricity generation 2035, said Wang Binghua, head nuclear energy public communication committee China Nuclear Energy Association, event Shenzhen, Guangdong province, Monday.
Amid China' ambitious target achieving carbon neutrality before 2060, country' installed nuclear power capacity estimated reach approximately 400 million kilowatts then, accounting around 18 percent total electricity generation. country expected maintain construction pace six eight nuclear power units per foreseeable future, said.
Considering comprehensive utilization nuclear energy purposes including heating powering vehicles, carbon reduction contribution nuclear energy expected reach approximately 25 percent 2060, added.
Figures released association reveal cumulative electricity generation operating nuclear power units nationwide reached 211.89 billion kilowatt-hours half, accounting 5.08 percent total national electricity generation.
Compared coal-fired power generation, equivalent reduction 59.64 million metric tons standard coal burned, decrease carbon dioxide emissions 156.2 million tons, said.
analyst said nuclear power stable reliable type clean energy compared solar wind power, intermittent due changing weather conditions.
China, become notable player global nuclear power landscape, actively developing nuclear power capacity recent, contributing diversified energy mix meet growing energy needs amid green energy transition, said Lin Boqiang, head China Institute Studies Energy Policy Xiamen University.
"Nuclear power application scenarios come apart power generation, serving fundamental power source large-scale development clean energy playing key role boosting utilization nuclear power energy-intensive sectors, petrochemicals steel," said.
so far applied heating, seawater desalination isotope production, China goes full throttle green energy transition, Lin said.
Wang said China approved construction 21 nuclear power units since beginning 14th Five- Plan (2021-25) period nuclear power project construction steadily advancing.
According plan, government aims 70 gigawatts installed nuclear capacity 2025.
association said so far there 55 nuclear power units operation Chinese mainland, total installed capacity approximately 57 million kW. country 24 nuclear power units under construction total installed capacity approximately 27.8 million kW, combined total nuclear power units operation under construction China ranking second world.

real baptism fire PV solar project gargantuan magnitude significance completed amid COVID-19 pandemic heat.
Why UAE - energy giant vast fossil fuel reserves rich seam mine - so bent undertaking energy transition become global clean energy powerhouse?
There real need change, contends Abdulaziz Alobaidli, chief operating officer Masdar - UAE' flagship renewable energy company major developer Al Dhafra solar power project. UAE benefited underlying "wisdom leadership", very dynamic "thinking future", says Alobaidli.
" need diversify economy energy resources enhance energy security," says, relying single source energy just too risky. Therefore, decarbonization "necessity" rather "luxury" "privilege". "We're committed decarbonizing value chain processes relating energy, upstream downstream."

Wang Jinwei, general manager Abu Dhabi branch Beijing-based China Machinery Engineering Corporation Group, explains fossil fuels, being carbon-intensive resource electricity, subject market fluctuations don't promise secure supply electricity. Resolved do part "Green Silk Road", CMEC secured $1 billion engineering, procurement construction contract build 2GW Al Dhafra solar photovoltaic project Abu Dhabi October 2022.
world' largest single-site solar photovoltaic plant, now full operation, expected help Abu Dhabi slash annual carbon emissions 2.4 million metric tons, raising proportion clean energy UAE' total energy mix 13 percent. equivalent removing 470,000 cars roads.
huge swathe desert distant nor silent. Apart -site workers clad florescent vests, protective high-top caps, thick rubber-soled boots, relative serenity punctuated time time creaks squeals.
Scratching heads try figure out where these sounds came, Wang tells : "They're solar modules (panels) rotating sync sun radiance shifts throughout day. Capturing largest possible amount sunlight ensures maximum generation electricity. No solar energy should wasted." So, solar panels come varying slopes throughout day, steepest being dusk dawn, says.
panels' movement too subtle detect, unrelenting noises tell-tale sign desert' vigor tirelessness lavishing city clean life.
When panels lie flat peacefully, face, around 7 pm each day, panel cleaning routine commences. film sand collected panels' surface would obstruct absorption rays subsequent electricity generation, explains Wang. So, dusting off panels important.
water conventional answer having panels cleaned, doesn't apply Abu Dhabi due city' meager rainfall. "Thus, come cleaning robots, automatic substitute, after brainstorming locals who're acquainted local natural conditions," says Wang.

project involved procuring four million bifacial solar PV modules Chinese mainland mounted 30,000 single-axis sun trackers. site' proximity sea means underground soil highly saline alkaline. protect piles, whose ends go deep ground, erosion, concrete had poured hole piling works.
high water level northeast would cause soil collapse when piling sunken soil choked burrowed holes. solution eventually surfaced - inserting plastic tube anchor soil before burrowing.

rigorous vetting approval process problem too, slowing down construction. " still made within 22 months, would 35 months under local timeline. had registered 14 million safety work hours early June," says.

#179
Climate: Analyst sees much potential collaboration
Experts expressed high expectations climate-themed technological cooperation between China United States, saying greatly reduce cost world' efforts cope global climate crisis.
They made remarks Monday news conference Beijing Hotel, where China' special envoy climate change, Xie Zhenhua, John Kerry, US' special presidential envoy climate, holding talks.
Kerry' four-day trip China, began Sunday, important contact climate issues between world' largest carbon emitters. comes after China suspended climate talks.
suspension talks eight countermeasures China rolled out response controversial visit Nancy Pelosi, then speaker House Representatives, Taiwan region August.
Liu Yanhua, honorary director China' national committee experts climate change, said there solid foundations Sino- climate cooperation, it' consensus heads state nations.
When President Xi Jinping met President Joe Biden ahead G20 summit Bali, Indonesia, November, " presidents emphasized nations must beef climate cooperation", said Liu, who former vice-minister science technology.
countries previously cooperated climate change issues many times, made great contributions global climate governance occasions, said, citing example success joint efforts promoting landmark 2015 Paris Agreement climate change.
China laid foundations international support agreement.
Following President Xi' trip June 2013, then president Barack Obama visited China November 2014. Obama' trip China, presidents made public China- Joint Announcement Climate Change, said they "resolved work closely together next address major impediments reaching successful global climate agreement Paris".
Liu noted four working groups set China following joint declaration 2021 COP26 United Nations climate change conference Glasgow, Scotland, were part foundation Sino- climate cooperation.
four groups were established leverage respective strengths sides climate cooperation various sectors, they already done some work, said.
world' largest carbon emitters biggest producers renewable energy, countries much cooperation potential tap promoting global energy transition, Liu said.
Making full use respective strengths, China consider carrying out climate cooperation third-party country. Another potential cooperation area sides technologies addressing climate change, said.
Citing report International Energy Agency 2021, Liu said 2050, almost half emission reductions come technologies now only demonstration prototype phase, if world wants realize net-zero emissions time.
There many problems address world strives tackle climate change. "No country immune climate change. Neither any single country address these problems itself. Only via cooperation promote progress," said.
Li Zheng, dean Institute Climate Change Sustainable Development Tsinghua University, stressed importance Sino- cooperation solar panel production part global climate efforts, citing study published journal Nature.
study estimated, between 2006 2020, based historical installed capacities well input material sales price data solar panel modules United States, Germany China - world' three largest solar-deploying countries - globalized solar supply chain saved countries combined $67 billion: $36 billion China, $24 billion $7 billion Germany.
study found if strong protectionist policies implemented - limiting free flow goods, talent capital going forward - solar panel costs higher 20 25 percent 2030.
Li said: "If technology develops fast, cost decrease rapidly.... case trade barriers rather cooperation, speed greatly reduced."

expert refrigeration, heat pumps, thermal humidity control, Wang created innovations related efficient conversion, storage, utilization low-grade thermal energy, according university.

country successfully carried out high-pressure pure hydrogen pipeline test testing ground Xinjiang Uygur autonomous region Northwestern China Sunday, according operator China Oil & Gas Pipeline Network Corp, nation' largest energy infrastructure owner, known PipeChina.
part company' efforts accelerate advancement cutting-edge technologies hydrogen storage transportation promote integrated development natural gas pipeline transportation new energy, said.
Zhu Shaolin, research director hydrogen department Trend-Bank, emerging industry research consulting company, said compared hydrogen tube trailers, current primary long-distance hydrogen transport method China worldwide - both costly inefficient - pipeline transportation hydrogen important method achieving large-scale, long-distance cost-effective movement chemical.
China' construction pure hydrogen transportation facilities began late compared developed countries, successful test provides technical support future construction hydrogen pipelines China, Zhu said.
Domestic energy companies China laying out plans build long-distance hydrogen pipelines country meet growing hydrogen demand transport sector accelerate green energy development country, including China Petrochemical Corp China National Petroleum Corp.
China Petrochemical Corp announced plans April build country' long-distance hydrogen pipeline stretching 400 kilometers Inner Mongolia autonomous region Beijing.
pipeline phase able handle 100,000 metric tons hydrogen each potential increase capacity 500,000 tons long run order transfer clean fuel effectively resource-rich west energy-consuming regions east, said company, known Sinopec.
company, nation' largest oil refiner fuel supplier, claims pipeline bolster China' efforts toward green energy transition.
After being put operation, supply Inner Mongolia replace current hydrogen production fossil fuels Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region, play pioneering role trans-regional hydrogen transmission help promote country' energy upgrades, said.

#188
Meijin Energy, coal coke producer North China' Shanxi province, recent expanded clean hydrogen sector making use oven gas coke production.
After several development, Meijin now able extract 96,000 metric tons hydrogen coke oven gas annually, enough power 10,000 hydrogen-powered vehicles.
Besides producing hydrogen, Meijin gone downstream industrial chain manufacturing new energy buses trucks operate using hydrogen.
"Green transition no means easy energy company," said Yao Jinlong, board chairman company. " past decade, tried many ways done many things. now confident doing right thing right track."
Hydrogen demand rise China, boosted rapid development new energy vehicles use hydrogen power. Compared cars powered lithium-ion batteries mostly personal use, hydrogen vehicles primarily developed commercial purposes, buses trucks, advantages heavier longer hauls.
According government plan hydrogen sector released, China aims 50,000 hydrogen fuel cell vehicles road 2025, 10,000 beginning. number expected rocket 1 million 2035, said China Society Automotive Engineers.
Yao, whose grandfather founded company 1980s, hails China' coal-rich Shanxi province. studied abroad get his bachelor' master' degrees joined Meijin when returned home.
Yao decided lead company hydrogen sector 2016 after studied number modern energy technologies found separating hydrogen coke oven gas viable option produce hydrogen low costs.
" large coke producer, Meijin plenty raw materials work. advantage," Yao said.

", replacement outdated coal capacity accelerated, government taken steps recent increase advanced coal production ensure sufficient power supply, aim coal playing larger role emergency backup power source."
green energy transition does mean shutting down coal plants overnight, Lin said.
Energy security must always come, exit process should prioritized. example, if local heat electricity supply cannot keep pace demand time, there no reason close production facilities, Lin said.
added phasing out use coal China " gradual sophisticated process, rather applying emergency brake".

Transition: Country invests others building clean energy supply chain
China led world energy transition investment $546 billion, nearly half global total, world saw investment reach new record 2022, according report published research analysis firm BloombergNEF.
United States distant second $141 billion, report said, adding European Union would second, $180 billion, if treated single bloc.
According report, global investment low-carbon energy transition totaled $1.1 trillion - new record huge acceleration before - energy crisis policy action drove faster deployment clean energy technologies.
BloombergNEF noted China contributed significant increase clean energy factory investment, report refers investment manufacturing facilities clean energy technologies.
investment grew $78.7 billion 2022, $52.6 billion 2021, BloombergNEF said. Manufacturing facilities batteries related components formed largest share investment $45.4 billion, solar factories attracted $23.9 billion., China accounted 91 percent manufacturing investment despite efforts countries capture global clean energy opportunity, report said.
Manufacturing capacity clean energy technologies unlikely major bottleneck achieving net-zero carbon emissions, Antoine Vagneur-Jones, BloombergNEF' head trade supply chains research, quoted saying news release research firm Jan 26.
"However, supply chain diversification point view, picture changed much. China investing far most building clean energy supply chain, remains seen if regions capture significant market share," said.
BloombergNEF estimated global fossil fuel investments stood $1.1 trillion 2022.
time global investment energy transition matched fossil fuel despite growth fossil fuel investments triggered year' energy crisis, report said.
" findings put bed any debate how energy crisis impact clean energy deployment," said Albert Cheung, head research firm' global analysis wing.
Rather slowing down, energy transition investment surged new record countries businesses continue execute transition plans. Investment clean energy technologies brink overtaking fossil fuel investments, emphasized.
"These investments drive short-term job creation help address medium-term energy security objectives," Cheung said. " investment needed get track net zero long term."
